entity_evidence.text: The Department of Finance may transfer up to $2,430,000 as a loan to the Pharmaceutical and Sharps Stewardship Fund.

entity_evidence.text: This loan shall be repaid with interest calculated at the rate earned by the Pooled Money Investment Account at the time of transfer.
